recommendations.title: On Body and Soul

recommendations.title: Fracchia The Human Beast
recommendations.overview: The world's greatest criminal and the world greatest loser share the same face... now they'll share the same life!

recommendations.title: Singles
recommendations.overview: A group of young adults in their twenties, who share an apartment in the city of Seattle, ponder on love and face all the challenges of adulthood.

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: To the Bone
recommendations.overview: A young woman dealing with anorexia meets an unconventional doctor who challenges her to face her condition and embrace life.

recommendations.title: Captain Fantastic
recommendations.overview: Deep in the forests of the Pacific Northwest, a father devoted to raising his six kids with a rigorous physical and intellectual education is forced to leave his paradise and enter the world, beginning a journey that challenges his idea of what it me

recommendations.title: Kaili Blues
recommendations.overview: Chen Sheng goes off in search of his nephew who has been abandoned by his father. Along the way, he encounters numerous people from his past and also those from his future.

recommendations.title: The Little Death
recommendations.overview: A comedy film that looks into the loosely connected lives of people with strange sexual fantasies.

recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.

recommendations.title: Motherhood
recommendations.overview: In Manhattan, a mother of two preparing for her daughter's sixth birthday party has no idea of the challenges she's about to face in order to pull off the event.
